title: The Passport (Amendment) Rules, 1992 (22.01.1992)
text: REGD. NO. D.L.-33004/92 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 78] NEW DELHI, WEDNESDAY, FEBRUARY 19, 1992/MAGHA 30,1913 Separate Paging is given to this Part in order that it may be filed as a separate compilation 469GI/92 (1) -- 1 of 4 -- , X , . , , , . THE GAZETTE OF INDIA:' EXTRAORDINARY [PART H—SEC. 3(i)3 MINISTRY OF EXTERNAL AFFAIRS (CPV Division) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 22nd January, 1992 O.S.R. 1U(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 24 of the Passport Act, 1967 (15 of 1967), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Passport Rules, 1980 namely :— 1. (1) These rules may be called the Passports (Amendment) Rules, 1992. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In Schedule I to the Passports Rules, 1980 for serial No. 6 and entries relating thereto, the following serial No. and entries shall be substituted, namely :— 1 'L6(0 6(ii) 6(iii) (a) (b) (c) (d) (a) (b) (c) (a) (b) 2 Regional Passport Officer, Cochin (Regional Passport Office, Cochin) Assistant Passport Officer (Regional Passport Office, Cochin) Public Relations Officer (Regional Passport Office, Cochin) Superintendent, (Regional Passport Office, Cochin) The Passport Officer, Kozhikode (Passport Office, Kozhikode) The Public Relations Officer (Passport Office, Kozhikode) Superintendent, (Passport Office, Kozhikode) The Passp ort Officer (Passport Office, Trivandrurn) Assistant Passport Officer, (Passport Office, Trivandrum) - 3 The Districts of Ernakulam, Alleppey, Kottayam, Trichur, ldukki, Palgbat and U.T.I. Lakshdweep. -do- -do- -do- The Districts of Cannunore, Kozhikode, Malapuram in the State of Kerala and the district of Mahe in the U.T.I. Pondicherry. -do- -do- The Districts of Trivandrum, Quilon, Pathanamthitta. -do- -- 2 of 4 -- 3 I (c) (d) 2 Public Relations Officer, (Passport Office, Trivandruin) Superintendent (Passport Office, Trivandrum) 3 -do- -do- [No. V-IV/553/1/91/CPO/2/92] M.P. SINGH Under Secy. Note : Principal rules published vide^ Notifcation No. GSR691(E) dated 11th December, 1980, Gazette of India, 1980 (Extraordinary) Part II, Section 3, Sub section (i) Subsequently amended by :— (i) Notification GSR 50(E) dated 7-2-1981 (ii) Notification GSR 469(E) dated 2-6-1982. (iii) Notification GSR 325(E) dated 12-4-1983 (tv) Notification GSR 494(E) dated 16-6-1983 (v) Notification GSR 345(E) dated 29-3-1985 (vi) Notification GSR 860(E) dated 4-11-1985, (vii) Notification GSR 857(E) dated 15-10-1987 (viii) Notification GSR 84(E) dated 11-2-1988 (ix) Notification GSR 1155(E) dated 8-12-1988 (x) Notification GSR 622(E) dated 27-6-1990 (xi) Notification GSR 653(E) dated 20-7-1990 (xii) Notification GSR - • dated (xiii) Notification yet to be published in the Gazette.
